roles.name: ceo_agent
roles.purpose: Own product direction and roadmap priority.

roles.name: foreman_agent
roles.purpose: Select the next task and produce an implementation plan.

roles.name: architect_agent
roles.purpose: Protect architecture and avoid duplicate systems.

roles.name: backend_agent
roles.purpose: Implement backend routes, schemas, services, and tests.

roles.name: frontend_agent
roles.purpose: Implement React pages, API clients, and components.

roles.name: qa_agent
roles.purpose: Run checks and summarize quality status.
